name: Content Pipeline — Upload → Watermark → AI Captions → Queue

parameters.name: messages

parameters.query: INSERT INTO content_queue (upload_id, platform, caption, hashtags, alt_text, status, created_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.upload_id }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', {{ $json.caption ? "'" + $json.caption.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "''" }}, '{{ $json.hashtags }}', {{ $json.alt_text ? "'" + $json.alt_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "''" }}, '{{ $json.status }}', '{{ $json.created_at }}')

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, message: 'Content generated and added to stash' }) }}
